tasks.title: Track RuoYi + Vue3 base integration and runtime validation
tasks.statusReason: Governance change CR-20260624T152423Z-governance-sales-order-handoff-gate adds sales-order-before handoff gates, current-context generation, multi-role review scaffolding, roadmap/debt checks, document/read/file-weight checks, and tests without touching customer business code. Follow-up M1/L1 hardening makes default check:review require Allow Implementation context-aware for business implementation paths and broadens phase-gate sales-order implementation naming detection. Push-preflight EISDIR follow-up makes file-weight checking skip directory entries safely and keeps finalize-generated changed-files records file-oriented.
tasks.nextStep: Future sales-order work must pass beforeSalesOrder and multi-role pre-review before implementation.

tasks.statusReason: CR-20260625T035514Z-change reconciles customer handoff state after GitHub master included d103b0d fix(customer): restrict deposit endpoint to customer deposit. This closeout updates README, feature brief, context, registry ownership, memory, changelog, and task state without changing customer runtime code or customer fund business logic.
tasks.nextStep: Review the CR-20260625T035514Z-change closeout diff and suggested commit message. Keep sales order, delivery, finance, source/channel/account, maintenance-fee calculation, commission calculation, automatic deduction, receipt claiming, reconciliation, and order-level deposit behavior in separate future feature changes.
